sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Latest CXT News - Crane NXT Announces Appointment of Jeffrey B...
feed.summary: Crane NXT (NYSE: CXT) is an industrial technology company focused on security, detection, and authentication. This page provides a news feed with updates on the company's operations, financial performance, strategic transactions, and investor events. Recent news includes the appointment of Jeffrey Benck to its Board of Directors, details on its 2026 Investor Day, Q4 and full-year 2025 results, and acquisition updates regarding Antares Vision.

feed.title: FGRO Top Holdings List & Exposure (Fidelity Fundamental Large Cap Growth ETF)
feed.summary: This article details the top holdings of the Fidelity Fundamental Large Cap Growth ETF (FGRO), revealing its significant exposure to major tech companies like NVIDIA, Microsoft, and Apple. The top 25 holdings constitute 77.72% of the fund, providing a breakdown by weight, current price, and shares held for each major company. It also mentions broader sector, geographic, industry, and currency exposure without providing extra detail.

feed.title: Kroger gives shoppers ways to save on gas in the spring
feed.summary: Kroger announced two upcoming 4X Fuel Points events for spring 2026, taking place from March 27-29 and April 3-5. This initiative allows customers to earn four times the usual Fuel Points on groceries and other eligible purchases, helping them save on fuel during increased spring travel. Shoppers can activate the offer via a digital or in-store coupon, with additional savings available for Boost by Kroger Plus members, gift card purchases, and pharmacy rewards.

feed.title: Canadian Solar Inc Stock: Navigating Solar Energy Expansion and Global Market Dynamics for Investors
feed.summary: Canadian Solar Inc. is a major player in the solar energy sector, focusing on photovoltaic module manufacturing and large-scale project development globally. The company's strategic expansion into North America, supported by manufacturing diversification and advanced technology, positions it well to capitalize on the increasing demand for renewable energy and policy incentives like the U.S. Inflation Reduction Act. However, investors should also consider risks such as market cyclicality, geopolitical tensions, and supply chain fluctuations.

feed.title: Cirrus Logic Shares up 7.2% After Apple Adds
feed.summary: Cirrus Logic (CRUS) shares surged 7.2% following news that Apple (AAPL) is adding the company's components to an additional device. This development implies potential for increased revenue from Apple, a major customer, strengthening Cirrus Logic's market position.

feed.title: CWH Investor Alert: Camping World Holdings, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit – Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Wagner Allegedly Misrepresented Demand Trends: Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a securities fraud lawsuit against Matthew D. Wagner, President and CEO of Camping World Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWH), alleging he misrepresented demand trends, inventory management, and SG&A efficiency between April 29, 2025, and February 24, 2026. This class action comes after CWH shares experienced significant declines following disclosures that contradicted Wagner's public statements. Investors who suffered losses during this period may be eligible to lead the class action, with a lead plaintiff deadline of May 11, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings after realignment (NYSE: CAT)
feed.summary: Vanguard Group has filed an updated Schedule 13G/A for Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT), indicating zero beneficial ownership after an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This realignment means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately, as permitted by SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing clarifies that Vanguard itself no longer directly reports aggregated beneficial ownership for Caterpillar shares.

feed.title: The Bull Case For General Electric (GE) Could Change Following Expanded Palantir AI Defense Partnership – Learn Why
feed.summary: GE Aerospace and Palantir Technologies have expanded their multi-year partnership to integrate AI tools across the U.S. Air Force and GE's production system to enhance efficiency and address supply bottlenecks. This collaboration reinforces GE Aerospace's strategy to leverage its installed engine base for recurring service revenue and improve operational efficiency. Investors are closely watching how these AI initiatives and capacity investments will impact GE's growth, profitability, and long-term valuation, with some analysts forecasting significant revenue and earnings increases by 2028.

feed.title: Expanded Opdivo Use and New Camzyos Data Could Be A Game Changer For Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY)
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) has announced expanded approvals for its drug Opdivo in Hodgkin lymphoma and new clinical data for Camzyos in obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy, including a successful Phase 3 trial in adolescents. These developments strengthen BMY's position in oncology and cardiovascular care, reinforcing existing growth pillars. While these updates modestly improve the near-term outlook, the company's long-term success hinges on its ability to leverage new launches and its late-stage pipeline to offset looming patent cliffs for key drugs.

feed.title: Best Buy’s Earnings Propel Stock Amid Global Tensions
feed.summary: Best Buy's stock rose by 4.64% following robust holiday sales projections and strong fiscal Q4 adjusted earnings, despite global challenges. The company increased its quarterly dividend and is focusing on high-margin areas like Ads and Marketplace to navigate potential macroeconomic headwinds. Analysts have mixed but largely confident views, with some revising price targets downwards due to anticipated operational challenges while others show optimism.

feed.title: Cirrus Logic Named Most Innovative in CSR, Barclays Lifts Price Target
feed.summary: Cirrus Logic Inc. has seen a 5.32% stock increase after being named among Fast Company’s ‘Most Innovative Companies’ for its Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) initiatives. Barclays has also raised its price target for Cirrus Logic from $110 to $120, citing updated semiconductor sector estimates and strong handset demand. The company demonstrates robust financial health with $1.9 billion in revenue and a 20.47% profit margin.

feed.title: Lennox International stock hits 52-week low at $442.40
feed.summary: Lennox International Inc. (LII) stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $442.40, marking a nearly 16% decline over the past year. Despite this, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued relative to its Fair Value, and the company maintains financial resilience, having raised its dividend for 16 consecutive years. Recent news also includes a fourth-quarter 2025 earnings miss but also strategic entry into the North American water heating market and positive analyst ratings.

feed.title: Honeywell Fell 7% in the Last 30 Days. Here’s Why the Stock Could Still Deliver Upside in 2026
feed.summary: Honeywell International's stock recently dropped 7% due to investors resetting growth expectations and a rotation out of industrial stocks. Despite the short-term dip, the company's fundamentals remain strong with steady business momentum in aerospace, building automation, and energy infrastructure. A valuation model projects a target price of $280, suggesting a 24% upside over the next 2.8 years, indicating the stock is modestly undervalued.

feed.title: Cencora to buy EyeSouth Partners' retina division in $1B deal
feed.summary: Cencora, Inc. is set to acquire EyeSouth Partners' retina division for $1.1 billion, expanding its Retina Consultants of America (RCA) network. RCA, in which Cencora holds an 85% interest, is a significant management service organization for retina specialists and boasts a large retina research program. This acquisition will integrate EyeSouth's retina-focused practices into RCA, providing them access to an extended network and clinical trial opportunities, with the deal expected to close by September 30.

feed.title: Regulators approve Duke Energy's proposal for new natural gas generation to support South Carolina's growing energy needs – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: The Public Service Commission of South Carolina has approved Duke Energy's plan to build new natural gas generation in Anderson County. This project aims to support the growing energy needs of the state, create thousands of construction jobs, and significantly contribute to the local economy. The facility, which will be Duke Energy's first new generation in the state in a decade, is anticipated to begin construction in summer 2027 and serve customers by early 2031.

feed.title: South Carolina approves Duke gas plant tied to 2,200 construction jobs
feed.summary: Duke Energy has received approval from the Public Service Commission of South Carolina to construct a 1,365 MW combined-cycle natural gas plant in Anderson County. This project, expected to begin construction in summer 2027 and be operational by early 2031, is projected to create over 2,200 construction jobs annually and contribute an $84 million annual economic impact to the state. The facility will incorporate advanced technologies, reducing water usage by 90% compared to traditional cooling methods.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group (PFG) Rating Reinstated by Keefe, Bruyette & Woods | PFG Stock News
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has reinstated a 'Market Perform' rating for Principal Financial Group (PFG), setting a target price of $92.00 USD. This follows several adjustments from other firms, including Morgan Stanley and Wells Fargo, with analysts forecasting an average target price of $94.25 for PFG. Principal Financial Group, a financial services provider, specializes in retirement, asset management, and workplace benefits, with its Retirement and Income Solutions segment generating the most revenue.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] Trane Technologies plc Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Trane Technologies PLC, disclosing that it now holds 0 shares (0%) of Trane Technologies common stock due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This amendment clarifies that certain Vanguard subsidiaries will report beneficial ownership separately, as permitted by SEC Release No. 34-39538, and does not indicate a change in investment strategy. The filing confirms that the subsidiaries maintain the same investment approaches as previously pursued by The Vanguard Group.

feed.title: The Chefs' Warehouse Stock Hits Day Low Amid Price Pressure at $57.44
feed.summary: The Chefs' Warehouse Inc. experienced a significant stock decline of 7.55%, hitting an intraday low of $57.44, contrasting with the overall market. Despite short-term losses (10.14% weekly, 16.24% monthly), the company demonstrates long-term resilience with an 11.57% one-year performance and strong financial health, including substantial net sales and operating profit increases. The company maintains a market capitalization of $2,607 million, indicating its continued prominence in the retailing sector.

feed.title: PCAR Analyst Rating Update: Freedom Broker Downgrades to Hold
feed.summary: Freedom Broker has downgraded PACCAR (PCAR) from 'Buy' to 'Hold' but raised its price target from $87.00 to $90.00. This update indicates a more cautious stance while still recognizing potential upside. Other analysts have issued varying ratings and price targets for PCAR in recent months, with the average target price from 15 analysts being $122.77, implying a 6.29% upside from the current price, despite GuruFocus's estimated GF Value suggesting a downside.

feed.title: Trending Industry Today: Applied Materials Leads Losses In Solar Power Stocks
feed.summary: This article identifies Applied Materials as the leading decliner in the solar power stock industry today. The content primarily focuses on this trend within the sector.

feed.title: CF Bankshares Appoints President Bradley Ringwald to Board
feed.summary: CF Bankshares Inc. and its subsidiary CFBank have appointed President Bradley Ringwald to their boards of directors, filling the vacancy left by Sundeep Rana. Ringwald, who has served as CFBank's president since October 2022, will sit on the board until the company's 2026 annual meeting. The appointment followed a governance committee recommendation, with the company emphasizing standard governance processes and ordinary-course banking relationships.

feed.title: 3M Company Stock: Innovation Resurgence and Shareholder Value in a Diversified Industrial Leader
feed.summary: 3M Company demonstrated strong 2025 performance, returning $4.8 billion to shareholders and introducing 284 new products, highlighting an innovation resurgence. The company maintains a diversified business model, ensuring steady revenue streams and mitigating market risks, with a significant increase in new product sales. North American investors are encouraged to note 3M's capital discipline, strong governance ahead of its 2026 annual meeting, and sustained institutional investor confidence.

feed.title: Apple Taps Bosch, TDK For US iPhone Parts As Domestic Spending Surges
feed.summary: Apple announced an expansion of its U.S. manufacturing efforts, partnering with Bosch, Cirrus Logic, TDK Corp, and Qnity Electronics. This move is part of Apple's $600 billion commitment to U.S. manufacturing, aiming to strengthen domestic supply chains for key iPhone components. TDK will produce sensors for iPhones in the U.S. for the first time, while Bosch and TSMC will produce integrated circuits.

feed.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Meta, Alphabet, Super Micro, Coherent, Sandisk, Pony AI, Best Buy, and More
feed.summary: The stock market saw sharp declines on Thursday, with major indexes falling. This downturn followed Iran's rejection of the Trump administration's efforts to broker a peace deal and a potential cease-fire. The article mentions several companies whose stocks were impacted, including Meta, Alphabet, Super Micro, Coherent, Sandisk, Pony AI, and Best Buy.

feed.title: Honeywell International Inc. Stock: Q1 Earnings Preview and Strategic Momentum Ahead of Key Mileston
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. (HON) is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings on April 23, 2026, with investors keenly anticipating updates on its aerospace spinoff, automation growth, and ongoing strategic partnerships. The company recently announced a collaboration with Rhombus for an AI-powered security platform, reinforcing its investment in high-margin software and services. While projected EPS is $2.32 and revenue around $9.27 billion, analysts emphasize monitoring ongoing structural changes, particularly the planned aerospace spinoff in Q3 2026, which is expected to unlock significant value.

feed.title: Nasdaq 100 nears correction as risks rise, QQQ ETF outflows jump
feed.summary: The Nasdaq 100 Index is nearing a correction, having dropped almost 10% from its peak this year, largely due to concerns over the escalating Iran war and significant outflows from ETFs like QQQ. The potential for a prolonged conflict is expected to keep crude oil prices and inflation high, leading to increased interest rates. Technical analysis suggests a bearish outlook for the Nasdaq 100, with further declines anticipated.

feed.title: Baseball is back. Here's how to watch games for free with T-Mobile
feed.summary: T-Mobile is offering its customers a free, season-long subscription to MLB.TV, valued at $149.99, to celebrate the start of the 2026 MLB season. The deal is available until March 31st at 4:59 a.m. and allows subscribers to watch out-of-market regular season games live or on demand, as well as other baseball content. This marks the 11th year T-Mobile has provided this benefit to its customers.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Gains Spot on Wolfe Favorites amid Growth Outlook
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) has been added to Wolfe Research's list of favorite stocks due to its growth outlook and position as a Dividend King and Aristocrat. The company offers a dividend yield of 2.15%, recently increased its payout, and has made strides in drug price reduction and pipeline expansion with promising clinical trial results for cancer treatments. JNJ, a diversified healthcare company, is set to report its first-quarter results on April 14.

feed.title: CF Bankshares (CFBK) appoints CFBank President Bradley Ringwald as director
feed.summary: CF Bankshares Inc. (CFBK) announced the appointment of Bradley Ringwald, President of CFBank, to its board of directors, effective March 25, 2026. He fills the vacancy left by Sundeep Rana and will serve until the company's 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. Ringwald's appointment was recommended by the Corporate Governance and Nominating Committee, with no special arrangements disclosed beyond his existing executive employment.

feed.title: PAYX Stock Rating Update: Citigroup Lowers Price Target to $99
feed.summary: Citigroup has reaffirmed its Neutral rating for Paychex (PAYX) but has reduced its price target from $120 to $99, a 17.50% decrease. This adjustment mirrors similar recent price target reductions by other firms like RBC Capital and BMO Capital. Analysts maintain a cautious stance on Paychex, a technology company specializing in human capital management solutions, with the average analyst target price at $104.47, indicating a "Hold" consensus.

feed.title: GE HealthCare and Stanford radiology expand partnership with new center of excellence
feed.summary: GE HealthCare and the Stanford Medicine Department of Radiology have expanded their research collaboration, creating a new center of excellence focused on advancing medical imaging technologies. This joint effort, building on over 40 years of partnership, will support research in MR, CT, molecular imaging, AI, pharmaceutical diagnostics, and interventional radiology. The center aims to integrate academic research, clinical expertise, and engineering capabilities to translate new imaging techniques into practical applications and improve patient care.

feed.title: GL: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Reinstates Globe Life with Outperfor
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has reinstated coverage of Globe Life (GL) with an "Outperform" rating and a price target of $168.00 USD, led by analyst Ryan Krueger. This follows several other analysts who recently raised their price targets for Globe Life. The average target price from 12 analysts is $170.08, indicating a potential upside of 23.43% from the current price.

feed.title: CNO Financial Group (CNO) Reinstated at Market Perform by Keefe, Bruyette & Woods | CNO Stock News
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has reinstated coverage of CNO Financial Group (CNO) with a 'Market Perform' rating and a price target of $46.00. This follows previous analyses from other firms with varying ratings and price targets, contributing to diverse market sentiments. CNO is an insurance holding company offering health, annuity, and life insurance products, with health products generating the majority of its revenue.

feed.title: HF Sinclair Corp (DINO) Shares Up 3.2% on Mar 26
feed.summary: HF Sinclair Corp (DINO) shares rose 3.20% in mid-day trading on March 26, reaching an intraday high of $62.94 before closing at $62.85. The stock is near its 52-week high, and Wall Street analysts have an average target price of $59.64, indicating a potential downside from the current price. GuruFocus estimates the fair value (GF Value) at $43.20, also suggesting a downside.

feed.title: CRUS Stock Surged More Than 7% Today — What’s The Apple Connection?
feed.summary: Cirrus Logic (CRUS) shares surged over 7% after Apple announced a partnership to develop new semiconductor process technologies and mixed-signal solutions, including for Face ID systems. CRUS will join Apple's American Manufacturing Program, with Apple planning to invest $400 million by 2030. Analysts suggest this indicates a new market opportunity for Cirrus Logic in FaceID technology, though it may take several years to fully materialize.

feed.title: Erste Group Downgrades Procter & Gamble (PG) on Cost Pressures and Weak Demand
feed.summary: Erste Group analyst Stephan Lingnau downgraded Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) to Hold from Buy, citing higher energy costs and weak consumer confidence in the US, which are expected to keep sales growth at the lower end of the company's guidance. Despite its strong dividend history and market position, the firm sees limited upside from current share levels. The report also suggests that certain AI stocks may offer greater upside potential with less downside risk compared to PG.

feed.title: MetLife's (MET) "Outperform" Rating Reiterated at Keefe, Bruyette & Woods
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods reiterated an "Outperform" rating on MetLife (NYSE: MET) with an $87 price target, suggesting a 25.10% upside potential. This comes after MetLife surpassed Q4 earnings estimates, reporting $2.49 EPS against $2.34 estimated, and revenue of $52.44 billion, a 27.6% year-over-year increase. Analysts collectively maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target of $93.42 for the financial services provider.

feed.title: United Reaches New Agreement with Association of Flight Attendants
feed.summary: United Airlines and the Association of Flight Attendants-CWA have announced a new tentative agreement, aiming to make United flight attendants the best-paid in the industry. The agreement, which includes immediate raises, top wages of $100 per hour, boarding pay, and a $740 million signing bonus, is pending approval by the AFA's Master Executive Council and subsequent ratification by flight attendants. If approved, the contract will be amendable after five years.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy Inc (FANG) Stock Price Up 3.58% on Mar 26
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy Inc (FANG) saw its stock price rise by 3.58% on March 26, reaching an intraday high of $203.29 and closing at $203.03. This puts the stock near its 52-week high, with analysts giving it an "Outperform" rating and an average one-year target price of $200.42. However, GuruFocus' estimated GF Value suggests a potential downside of 21.18% from the current price.

feed.title: APA Stock Surges Amid Price Target Upgrades
feed.summary: APA Corporation's stock surged by 4.31% due to positive investor sentiment driven by multiple analyst upgrades and an improved outlook. Barclays, JPMorgan, Capital One, and Raymond James all raised their price targets, citing factors like significant gas market exposure, Middle East geopolitical turbulence adding an oil risk premium, and overall energy sector outperformance. The company's robust revenue figures and favorable Price to Earnings ratio also contribute to increasing investor confidence.

feed.title: Smart Money Is Moving Active—Northern Trust's US Equity ETF Eyes The Spotlight
feed.summary: Northern Trust has launched a new actively managed U.S. Equity ETF (NOEQ), marking a shift into the competitive core U.S. equity space. The fund debuted on March 20 with a low expense ratio of 12 basis points, targeting mid- and large-cap U.S. stocks with tax efficiency benefits. This move positions Northern Trust to capitalize on the growing demand for active ETFs, which offer professional management in volatile markets.

feed.title: 10 Industrials Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today's Session
feed.summary: This article identifies 10 industrial stocks that experienced unusual options activity, known as "whale alerts," during the current session. These alerts indicate significant trades by large investors, which can potentially influence option prices, and traders often monitor such activity for investment opportunities. The article details specific call and put option trades for companies like Grab Holdings, GE Vernova, Boeing, and Lockheed Martin, including strike prices, expiration dates, and sentiment.

feed.title: The Mosaic Company Stock Faces Wall Street Downgrades Amid Phosphate Margin Pressures and Rising Input Costs
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company (MOS) has received multiple downgrades from Wall Street analysts, including UBS, Bank of America, and Freedom Capital Markets, due to concerns over compressed phosphate margins. Rising sulfur and ammonia costs, driven by Middle East supply disruptions, are expected to create a significant EBITDA headwind for Q1 2026, pushing profitability improvements to 2027. Investors are monitoring the company as its shares have declined, underscoring near-term headwinds in the fertilizer sector.

feed.title: GM Financial to Release First Quarter 2026 Operating Results
feed.summary: GM Financial announced it will release its first quarter 2026 operating results on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. The financial results, including a press release and earnings presentation, will be made available on the Investor Relations section of the Company's website. The company also provided scheduled dates for its subsequent earnings announcements for Q2 and Q3 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings after realignment; Chubb Ltd (NYSE: CB) shows 0% ownership
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G indicating 0% beneficial ownership in Chubb Ltd (NYSE: CB) following an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This realignment caused certain Vanguard subsidiaries to report their beneficial ownership separately. The filing clarifies that this change reflects an organizational restructuring for reporting purposes, not an economic disposition of Chubb Ltd shares.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Updates NextEra Energy (NEE) Target on Load Growth and Data Center Demand
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its price target for NextEra Energy (NEE) to $110 from $106, while maintaining an Overweight rating. This update considers increasing load growth, particularly from data centers, and new project developments. NextEra Energy is reportedly securing land in Texas for a gas-fired power plant to support a large data center campus, part of a 10 GW development plan approved by the US administration.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 0 CNH Industrial shares after reorganization (CNH)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting zero beneficial ownership of CNH Industrial common stock following an internal reorganization on January 12, 2026. This change is due to certain Vanguard subsidiaries now reporting their holdings separately under SEC Release No. 34-39538, rather than indicating a sale of shares. The filing was signed by Ashly Grim on March 26, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; reports 0 BTSG shares (NYSE: BTSG)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for BrightSpring Health Services Inc. (BTSG), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned and 0% of the class. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately, in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The amendment reflects a change in reporting structure rather than a sale or purchase of shares, indicating a neutral immediate impact for investors.

feed.title: Airbnb Experiences: Transforming Travel into Immersive Local Adventures
feed.summary: Airbnb Experiences have become a significant growth driver for the company, moving beyond traditional lodging to offer immersive, locally-led activities. This segment helps diversify revenue, strengthens customer engagement by bundling experiences with stays, and taps into the growing experiential travel market. Despite facing competition and regulatory challenges, Experiences provide a unique differentiator for Airbnb, contributing to its overall financial health and appealing to modern travelers seeking authentic encounters.
